channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: us
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: us

item.title: Recall for broccoli sold at Walmart in 20 states upgraded to highest risk level: FDA
item.description: The Food and Drug Administration has upgraded its classification of a broccoli recall initially reported in late December, labeling it as “Class I” — the agency’s most serious recall category.
item.dc:creator: Michael Bartiromo, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Tariff threats take aim at fentanyl trafficking. Here's how the drug reaches the US
item.description: President Donald Trump's plan to impose tariffs on goods from Mexico, Canada and China is partly aimed at combating the illicit flow of fentanyl into the U.S., where the opioid is blamed for some 70,000 overdose deaths annually. Mexico agreed Monday to send 10,000 troops to the U.S.
item.dc:creator: JESSE BEDAYN, Associated Press, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: Tariff threats take aim at fentanyl trafficking. Here's how the drug reaches the US
item.description: President Donald Trump's threat of tariffs on goods from Mexico, Canada and China is aimed at stopping the flow of fentanyl into the U.S. Chinese and Mexican officials say the opioid crisis is largely a U.S. problem because that's where the demand is.
item.dc:creator: Jesse Bedayn, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: What is known about the deadly collision between a passenger jet and Army helicopter
item.description: American Airlines Flight 5342 and an Army helicopter collided in midair near Washington D.C.'s Reagan National Wednesday night, sending the two aircraft into the Potomac River and killing all 67 aboard in the deadliest U.S. air disaster since 2001.
item.dc:creator: JOHN RABY, Associated Press, KREX 5

item.title: Book Review: Chris Hayes' 'Sirens' Call' is a thorough look at the fight for attention in modern age
item.description: It's no new big news that we're living in an era of distraction. States are trying to clamp down on cell phones in schools, social media has been called a health risk for kids and some are trying undergo various “digital detox” practices.
item.dc:creator: ANDREW DeMILLO, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Musk is a 'special government employee,' the White House confirms
item.description: WASHINGTON (AP) — Elon Musk is working for President Donald Trump as a “special government employee," according to a White House official, solidifying his controversial role in the administration but sidestepping some disclosure rules that are typical of federal workers.
item.dc:creator: CHRIS MEGERIAN, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: What is USAID? Explaining the US foreign aid agency and why Trump and Musk want to end it
item.description: In its first two weeks, President Donald Trump’s administration has made significant changes to the U.S. Agency for International Development.
item.dc:creator: Ellen Knickmeyer And Meg Kinnard, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: Who gets more disaster aid? Republican states. Experts explain that and more about FEMA
item.description: WASHINGTON (AP) — Federal disaster aid is nearly everywhere. About 94% of Americans live in a county that has gotten Federal Emergency Management Agency help for disasters since 2011.
item.dc:creator: SETH BORENSTEIN, Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: Who gets more disaster aid? Republican states. Here's the breakdown
item.description: Experts say every state gets millions in federal help — and a little more goes to Republican states and congressional districts.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: Dozens of Education Department staffers on leave amid Trump's DEI purge
item.description: Dozens of employees with the Department of Education were placed on administrative leave on Friday, allegedly after attending a diversity training course encouraged by then-Secretary Betsy DeVos during the first Trump administration.
item.dc:creator: Lexi Lonas Cochran, WGN 9

item.title: Britain's Starmer seeks strong ties with both the EU and Donald Trump. That could be tricky
item.description: LONDON (AP) — Keir Starmer travels to Brussels on Monday, becoming the first British prime minister to attend a European Union leaders’ meeting since the U.K. left the bloc five years ago.
item.dc:creator: JILL LAWLESS, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: New York shields abortion pill prescribers after a doctor was indicted in Louisiana
item.description: New York Gov. Kathy Hochul has signed a bill to shield the identities of doctors who prescribe abortion medications, days after a physician in the state was charged with prescribing abortion pills to a pregnant minor in Louisiana.
item.dc:creator: Anthony Izaguirre, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: The Latest: Trump agrees to pause tariffs on Mexico for a month
item.description: U.S. President Donald Trump and Mexican President Claudia Sheinbaum say their planned tariffs are on hold for a month to give time for further negotiations.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Trump tariffs 'not what American economy needs right now': Klobuchar
item.description: “I’ve favored these targeted tariffs, but he is not using a chisel,” Klobuchar added. “He is using a sledgehammer.
item.dc:creator: Sarah Fortinsky, NewsNation

item.title: Fans at Raptors game continue trend of booing US national anthem at pro sporting events in Canada
item.description: TORONTO (AP) — Fans at a Toronto Raptors game continued an emerging trend Sunday of booing the American national anthem at pro sporting events in Canada.
item.dc:creator: IAN HARRISON, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: USAID leaders escorted out of building after blocking DOGE access to secure systems
item.description: Senior officials at the USAID were placed on administrative leave after they refused to turn over classified material.
item.dc:creator: Lauren Irwin, NewsNation

item.title: American bald eagles are having a moment, ecologically and culturally
item.description: WEST ORANGE, N.J. (AP) — Along the long road from American icon to endangered species and back again, the bald eagle — the national bird of the United States, often seen against a clear blue sky — is having a moment.
item.dc:creator: MIKE CATALINI, Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: Army identifies 3rd soldier killed in DC crash
item.description: The U.S. Army on Saturday identified the third soldier who died last week during a training mission that ended in a midair crash between an Army Black Hawk helicopter and an American Airlines regional jet near Ronald Reagan Washington National Airport.
item.dc:creator: Sarah Fortinsky, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Lawsuit blames deaths on 2023 train derailment in Ohio as JD Vance visits
item.description: A new lawsuit alleges for the first time that people died because of the disastrous 2023 East Palestine train derailment.
item.dc:creator: Josh Funk, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: Trump kept his tariffs pledge. Is he ready for the fallout? Are Americans? What to know
item.description: The Budget Lab at Yale University estimates Trump’s tariffs would cost the average American household $1,000 to $1,200 in annual purchasing power.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, WFLA, NBC

item.title: EU warns Trump it would ‘respond firmly’ to tariffs
item.description: “The EU would respond firmly to any trading partner that unfairly or arbitrarily imposes tariffs on EU goods,” a spokesperson said. “There is a lot at stake.
item.dc:creator: Lauren Irwin, NewsNation

item.title: Luka Doncic heads to the Lakers and Anthony Davis goes to the Mavs in blockbuster trade
item.description: The trade was put together in secret, with only a precious few people knowing what was happening. Luka Doncic didn't know. Anthony Davis didn't know. Their coaches didn't know. Their teammates didn't know. And then it happened — an absolute blockbuster.
item.dc:creator: TIM REYNOLDS, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Remains of North Carolina mom missing since 2023 found by dive team: deputies
item.description: Dana Mustian never showed up at her daughter’s 6th birthday party in December 2023. Her remains have since been located by a dive team.
item.dc:creator: Rodney Overton, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Texas Guard deputized with immigration and arrest authority
item.description: This comes after NewsNation witnessed the Texas guard babysitting a woman because they had no power to do anything else.
item.dc:creator: Ali Bradley, NewsNation

item.title: Passengers, crew killed in 'high-impact' air ambulance crash in Philadelphia identified
item.description: Authorities said a seventh person, who had been in a car at the time of the crash, has died. Their identity has not yet been released.
item.dc:creator: Addy Bink, WGN 9

item.title: Watch: Fans boo US national anthem at NHL game in Canada amid trade war
item.description: The booing came shortly after Trump signed an order imposing stiff tariffs on imports from Canada, Mexico, and China.
item.dc:creator: Will Conybeare, Fox 5

item.title: Families visit DC crash site days after the deadliest US air disaster in a generation
item.description: Dozens of people walked along the banks of the Potomac River near Reagan National Airport, close to where an American Airlines jet and an Army Black Hawk helicopter collided Wednesday, killing all 67 aboard.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: China to file lawsuit with WTO, vows 'countermeasures' in response to Trump tariffs
item.description: In a statement, the ministry’s spokesperson vowed further “countermeasures” against the United States but did not specify what steps it would take.
item.dc:creator: Sarah Fortinsky, KRON4

item.title: Trump puts tariffs on Canada, Mexico and China, spurring trade war as North American allies respond
item.description: WASHINGTON (AP) — President Donald Trump on Saturday signed an order to impose stiff tariffs on imports from Mexico, Canada and China, drawing swift retaliation and an undeniable sense of betrayal from the country's North American neighbors as a trade war erupted among the longtime allies.
item.dc:creator: JOSH BOAK, ZEKE MILLER, ROB GILLIES and CHRISTOPHER SHERMAN, Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: Black box recovered in Philadelphia medical transport jet crash: NTSB
item.description: The cockpit voice recorder was located at the site of initial impact, at a depth of 8 feet, according to the NTSB.
item.dc:creator: Mills Hayes, Fox 5

item.title: US colleges returning to campus sexual assault rules created during Trump's first term
item.description: WASHINGTON (AP) — Schools and universities responding to complaints of sexual misconduct must return to policies created during President Donald Trump's first term, with requirements for live hearings and more protections for accused students, according to new guidance issued Friday by the Education
item.dc:creator: COLLIN BINKLEY, Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: North Carolina's ex-lieutenant governor dismisses lawsuit against CNN, has no plans to run again
item.description: RALEIGH, N.C. (AP) — North Carolina's former Lt. Gov. Mark Robinson on Friday withdrew his defamation lawsuit against CNN that challenged a report about him making explicit posts on a pornography website’s message board over a decade ago.
item.dc:creator: GARY D. ROBERTSON, Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: Mother, daughter identified as victims in DC plane-helicopter collision
item.description: More details about the 67 people who died in the helicopter and plane crash outside of Washington D.C. are being shared. Several victims were Virginia residents from Loudon and Fairfax counties, ranging from parents to children.
item.dc:creator: Allison Williams, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Department of Education undoes Biden's Title IX rules on gender
item.description: The Department of Education announced Friday it is scrapping former President Biden's 2024 Title IX changes, getting rid of discrimination protection based on gender identity and sexual orientation and changing how sexual assault cases are handled on campus.
item.dc:creator: Lexi Lonas Cochran, WGN 9

item.title: 40+ bodies pulled from Potomac near Reagan National
item.description: More than 40 bodies have been recovered from the Potomac River after a deadly mid-air collision sent an Army Black Hawk helicopter and American Airlines plane diving into the icy water earlier this week, according to The Associated Press.
item.dc:creator: Ashleigh Fields, Fox 5

item.title: Officials probe cause of DC plane crash
item.description: American Airlines Flight 5342 with 60 passengers and four crew hit an Army helicopter near Washington D.C.'s Reagan National Wednesday night, sending the two aircraft into the Potomac River and killing all aboard in the deadliest U.S. air crash in more than two decades.
item.dc:creator: DAVE COLLINS and HALLIE GOLDEN Associated Press, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Trump warns Canada, Mexico tariffs are coming on Saturday
item.description: President Donald Trump on Thursday said he plans to follow through on Saturday on his threat to impose 25 percent tariffs on goods from Mexico and Canada.
item.dc:creator: Brett Samuels, Fox 5
